run.root_cause: The notebook-derived Bayesian prior + embedding probe pipeline is live; next steps are submission bundle parity and calibration.

experiment.title: Perch cached-probe baseline
experiment.hypothesis: Work item workitem-perch-baseline: Perch cached-probe baseline

decision.next_action: Launch a 3-branch portfolio targeting submission bundle parity (primary), prior calibration refinement (hedge), and probe-head class-count diagnostic (explore). Do not submit.
decision.root_cause: The perch cached-probe baseline achieved val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665 but submission bundle parity is not yet validated. The submission bar guidance explicitly requires multi-round iteration before consuming daily quota. The current state is round 1 of the expected iteration cycle.
decision.why: Three factors block immediate submission: (1) the CPU-only, internet-off bundle has not been dry-run locally, (2) the submission bar requires at least calibration and ensemble iteration beyond the raw baseline, and (3) open questions about fitted_class_count vs active_class_count remain unresolved. The veto checker blocks class_coverage axes, and the branch diversifier recommends backbone/probe_head/prior_calibration as the viable mix. Collapsing to a single low-information calibration sweep would waste branch budget when the bundle pipeline itself is unvalidated.
decision.next_title: Perch cached-probe round 2: bundle parity + calibration + diagnostic
decision.portfolio_intent: Validate submission pipeline readiness while parallel-testing calibration improvement and resolving class-count uncertainty. Do not consume daily quota until bundle dry-run passes.

portfolio_policy.submission_barrier: round 2 of multi-round cycle — do not submit

branch_mix.rationale: Submission bundle parity is the single blocking task per all adopt-now cards.
Test anchor-based calibration to close 0.662→0.665 gap. Conditional policy awaiting evidence.
Resolve fitted vs active class count open question. Low cost, high diagnostic value.

branch_portfolio.title: Bundle parity: CPU-only submission dry-run
branch_portfolio.hypothesis: Packaging the Perch embedding cache + linear probe + Bayesian prior into a CPU-only, internet-off notebook will reproduce val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665 within tolerance.
branch_portfolio.rationale: Adopt-now card explicitly identifies this as the single blocking task. Without validated bundle parity, no Kaggle submission is safe.
branch_portfolio.falsification_criterion: Dry-run prediction checksum does not match local run-0001 predictions within 1e-6 tolerance.
branch_portfolio.kill_criterion: Bundle fails to run within 90-minute CPU limit or produces empty submission CSV.

branch_portfolio.title: Prior calibration: anchor-based refinement
branch_portfolio.hypothesis: Anchor-based calibration against LB history will close the val_prior_fusion (0.662) to val_probe (0.665) gap, yielding a net positive when fused.
branch_portfolio.rationale: Post-parity consideration card identifies the Bayesian prior as close but not optimal. Prior calibration policy is conditional — this branch provides evidence for promotion or relegation.
branch_portfolio.falsification_criterion: Calibrated prior fusion score does not improve over 0.662 on the same holdout split.
branch_portfolio.kill_criterion: Calibration introduces regression below 0.65 on any holdout metric.

branch_portfolio.title: Probe diagnostic: fitted vs active class count
branch_portfolio.hypothesis: Inspecting probe output dimensions will reveal whether fitted_class_count >= active_class_count, resolving the conditional probe_head and class_coverage policy states.
branch_portfolio.rationale: Open question from research stage. Answer is required before any coverage or threshold-tuning branch can be safely proposed. Low cost, high diagnostic value.
branch_portfolio.falsification_criterion: N/A — diagnostic branch produces a measurement, not a score comparison.
branch_portfolio.kill_criterion: Probe output cannot be loaded or dimensions are unreadable.

research.root_cause: The perch cached-probe baseline (val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665) is live but submission bundle parity is not yet validated. The immediate gap is not model performance but submission pipeline readiness: the notebook-derived Bayesian prior + embedding probe pipeline needs a CPU-only, internet-off bundle that reproduces the local score before any daily submission quota is consumed. The val_prior_fusion_macro_roc_auc (0.662) is close to the primary metric (0.665), confirming the probe head is working but calibration refinement remains conditional.

Bayesian prior calibration anchor submission readiness
class coverage gap fitted vs active classes perch probe
holdout soundscape validation metric interpretation cached probe
submission bar minimum iteration threshold perch baseline

The immediate gap is not model performance but submission pipeline readiness: the notebook-derived Bayesian prior + embedding probe pipeline needs a CPU-only, internet-off bundle that reproduces the local score before any daily submission quota is consumed. The val_prior_fusion_macro_roc_auc (0.662) is close to the primary metric (0.665), confirming the probe head is working but calibration refinement remains conditional.
problem_frame.hypothesis: Three factors block immediate submission: (1) the CPU-only, internet-off bundle has not been dry-run locally, (2) the submission bar requires at least calibration and ensemble iteration beyond the raw baseline, and (3) open questions about fitted_class_count vs active_class_count remain unresolved. The veto checker blocks class_coverage axes, and the branch diversifier recommends backbone/probe_head/prior_calibration as the viable mix. Collapsing to a single low-information calibration sweep would waste branch budget when the bundle pipeline itself is unvalidated.
problem_frame.next_action: Launch a 3-branch portfolio targeting submission bundle parity (primary), prior calibration refinement (hedge), and probe-head class-count diagnostic (explore). Do not submit.

cards.title: Adopt Now
cards.summary: 1. **Validate submission bundle parity.** Package the Perch embedding cache + linear probe + Bayesian prior into a CPU-only, internet-off notebook. Dry-run locally before any Kaggle submission. (submission-findings)
cards.text:
1. **Validate submission bundle parity.** Package the Perch embedding cache + linear probe + Bayesian prior into a CPU-only, internet-off notebook. Dry-run locally before any Kaggle submission. (submission-findings)
2. **Anchor on val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc.** This is the holdout-aware primary signal. Ignore the inflated train-side 0.992. (validation-and-metric-semantics, experiment-rules)

cards.title: Actionable Guidance
cards.summary: Immediate**: Revert to the run-0002 code state as the base for round 4. Diagnose the round 3 regression by diffing configs and code before making any new changes. Close the 8-class gap with a single minimal change, th...
cards.text: **Immediate**: Revert to the run-0002 code state as the base for round 4. Diagnose the round 3 regression by diffing configs and code before making any new changes. Close the 8-class gap with a single minimal change, then validate that fitted_class_count reaches 75 before touching anything else.

cards.title: Consider (Post-Parity)
cards.summary: **Prior calibration refinement**: The 0.662 prior-fusion score vs 0.665 probe score suggests the Bayesian prior is close but not optimal. Anchor-based calibration against LB history could close this gap.
cards.text:
- **Prior calibration refinement**: The 0.662 prior-fusion score vs 0.665 probe score suggests the Bayesian prior is close but not optimal. Anchor-based calibration against LB history could close this gap.
- **Class coverage check**: If fitted classes lag active classes, expand coverage before threshold/temperature tuning. Conditional until probe output dimensions are inspected.
- **Embedding ensemble**: A second complementary probe head could add signal, but only after the single-probe baseline submission is validated.
- **Submission bar compliance**: The baseline is round 1. The submission bar guidance recommends iterating through calibration, ensemble, soundscape prior, and post-processing before submitting.

cards.title: Current State
cards.summary: The perch cached-probe baseline completed with **val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc = 0.665**. The run succeeded but the system correctly identifies that submission bundle parity is the blocking gap — not model iteration.
cards.text: The perch cached-probe baseline completed with **val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc = 0.665**. The run succeeded but the system correctly identifies that submission bundle parity is the blocking gap — not model iteration.

cards.title: Progress Tracker
cards.text:
| Round | Focus | Status |
|-------|-------|--------|
| 1 | Baseline | Done — 0.665 val, 52/75 classes |
| 2 | Coverage expansion | Done — 0.678 val, 67/75 classes (**current best**) |
| 3 | Close 8-class gap + calibration | **Regressed** — 0.676 val, 63/75 classes, prior fusion broken |
| 4 | Revert + incremental coverage fix | **Next move** |
| 5 | Isolated calibration | Pending |
| 6 | Domain robustness | Pending |
| 7 | Ensemble complementarity | Pending |
| 8+ | Post-processing and submission probe | Pending |

cards.title: Example
cards.text:
**Bad**:
- "Perch baseline" scores 0.75 → submit ❌
- Why: It's just cached embeddings + linear probe

**Good**:
- Round 1: "Perch baseline" → iterate
- Round 2: "Perch + calibration" → iterate
- Round 3: "Perch + ensemble" → iterate
- Round 4: "Perch + soundscape prior" → iterate
- Round 5: "Perch + post-processing" → iterate
- Round 6: "Perch full pipeline" → submit ✅
- Why: 6 rounds, multiple techniques, validated approach

cards.title: run-0003-0002-perch-probe-round-3-close-8-class-coverage-gap-to-75-75-and-apply-calibration
cards.text:
- Experiment: `exp-0002-perch-probe-round-3-close-8-class-coverage-gap-to-75-75-and-apply-calibration`
- Best AUC: 0.675847
- Root cause: Round 3 coupled two structural changes (coverage expansion + calibration) in a single code change, which destabilized probe fitting: fitted_class_count dropped from 67 to 63, val ROC-AUC regressed from 0.6777 to 0.6758, and val_prior_fusion collapsed from 0.662 to 0.475. The prior fusion collapse is especially diagnostic — since the Bayesian prior requires no training, its holdout degradation points to a data pipeline, class filtering, or evaluation config bug introduced in round 3.
- Verdict: submission-required

cards.title: Reject
cards.summary: **Do not submit without dry-run.** Consume no daily quota until the CPU bundle reproduces predictions locally.
cards.text:
- **Do not submit without dry-run.** Consume no daily quota until the CPU bundle reproduces predictions locally.
- **Do not micro-tune the probe head** before bundle parity and class coverage are resolved.
- **Do not trust train-side metrics** for submission decisions.

capability_packs.title: Veto Checker
capability_packs.when_to_use: Use when deterministic policy rules and decision constraints should mechanically block weak branches.
capability_packs.returns: Forbidden patterns, override-required components, and active veto rule summaries.

capability_packs.title: Branch Diversifier
capability_packs.when_to_use: Use when the next batch should preserve sibling diversity instead of serially repeating one axis.
capability_packs.returns: Recommended branch mix and target branch count.

capability_packs.when_to_use: Use when the frontier is overfit to grounded priors and still needs one explicit novel lane.
